_publications._publicationTitle: Recommendations for assessing appearance concerns related to plexiform and cutaneous neurofibromas in neurofibromatosis 1 clinical trials.

_contextSnippet: this measure needs to undergo a qualitative assessment with NF1 patient input, such as through focus groups and cognitive interviews. The results of this assessment will determine whether this measure or a newly created tool should be evaluated
details: Needs qualitative assessment with NF1 patient input through focus groups and cognitive interviews to determine suitability for NF1 clinical trials
